spec_match.rationale: Elegant native execution comparing synchronous selection read inside click versus standard setTimeout(0) macro-task wrapping on a real DOM textarea.

interactive.rationale: Immediate drag selection triggers logging side-by-side with a clear logs action button.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with the Workaround Killer description.

edge_cases.rationale: Beautifully illustrates the timing differences (micro/macro task boundary) of the old workaround vs. the new standard behavior.

references.rationale: Includes correct ChromeStatus and MDN mouseup documentation links.

design_system.rationale: Uses color-coding badges appropriately following showcase guidelines.
